falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises above $150,000 (previous all-time high for the asset)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this level would indicate strong bullish momentum, contradicting the 'bottom' pattern and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would suggest extreme market pressure, refuting the current pattern's stability and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200%+ of the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate a major market shift or event, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
